title: Google and Kaggle’s GenAI Intensive Vibe Coding course 2026
description: Google is bringing back its 5-Day AI Agents Intensive Course with Kaggle and registration is open.

title: Introducing Deep Research and Deep Research Max
description: Introducing Deep Research and Deep Research Max, the next generation of Google’s autonomous research agents.

title: Google AI subscribers get premium features in AI Studio
description: Starting today, Google AI Pro and Ultra subscribers get increased usage limits in Google AI Studio. This update also includes access to Nano Banana Pro and Gemini Pro mo…

title: Prepay for the Gemini API in Google AI Studio
description: Prepay billing is now available in Google AI Studio for the Gemini API.

title: Customize your Gemini agent in Colab
description: Two new improvements to Colab’s Gemini agent give you more control over how Google Colab works and how it helps you learn.

title: Gemma 4: Our most capable open models to date
description: Gemma 4: our most intelligent open models to date, purpose-built for advanced reasoning and agentic workflows.

title: Flex and Priority tiers in the Gemini API
description:
Google is introducing two new inference tiers to the Gemini API, Flex and Priority,
to balance cost and latency.

title: Google AI announcements from March
description: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from March 2026

title: Improve coding agents’ performance with Gemini API Docs MCP and Agent Skills.
description: Agents can generate outdated Gemini API code because their training data has a cutoff date. We built two complementary tools to fix this.The Gemini API Docs MCP (https:/…

title: How developers can use Veo 3.1 Lite for AI video generation
description: Veo 3.1 Lite  is now available in paid preview through the Gemini API and for testing in Google AI Studio.

title: Build real-time conversational agents with Gemini 3.1 Flash Live
description: Google is launching Gemini 3.1 Flash Live via the Live API in Google AI Studio, for building realtime voice and vision agents.

title: How developers can use Lyria 3 for AI music generation
description: Lyria 3 is now available in paid preview through the Gemini API and for testing in Google AI Studio.

title: Lyria 3 expands to more Google products, adds more features
description: We are bringing Lyria 3 to the tools where professionals work and create every day.

title: Introducing Kaggle Community Hackathons
description: Kaggle Community Hackathons enable people to to create their own hackathons with prizes up to $10,000.

title: Design UI using AI with Stitch from Google Labs
description: Stitch is evolving into an AI-native platform that allows anyone to create, iterate, and collaborate on high-fidelity UI.

title: Vibe Code to production with Google AI Studio
description: Start building real apps for the modern web with the Antigravity coding agent and Firebase integration now in Google AI Studio.

title: Gemini API tooling updates: context circulation, tool combos and Maps grounding
description: Developers can now combine function calling with built-in tools such as Google Search in a single Gemini API call to build agentic and complex tool-use applications.

title: More transparency and control over Gemini API costs
description: Google introduces new features in AI Studio to enable developers to set monthly spend caps and scale effectively.

title: Gemini Embedding 2: Our first natively multimodal embedding model
description: An overview of Gemini Embedding 2, our first fully multimodal embedding model that maps text, images, video, audio and documents into a single space.

title: How Googlers built the 2026 I/O save the date puzzle
description: For this year’s I/O Save the date, we’re showing how anyone can build incredible games with help from Gemini.
